# WindowsFirewall

Contains fully formed Windows Firewall log messages that already match the WindowsFirewall table format.

|**Resource types**|microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces,<br>microsoft.compute/virtualmachines,<br>microsoft.conenctedvmwarevsphere/virtualmachines,<br>microsoft.azurestackhci/virtualmachines,<br>microsoft.scvmm/virtualmachines,<br>microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets|
